{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/180476984?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ahacker1-securesaml/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ahacker1-securesaml/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ahacker1-securesaml/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ahacker1-securesaml/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/ahacker1-securesaml", "id": 180476984, "login": "ahacker1-securesaml", "node_id": "U_kgDOCsHcOA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ahacker1-securesaml/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ahacker1-securesaml/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ahacker1-securesaml/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ahacker1-securesaml/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ahacker1-securesaml/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/ahacker1-securesaml", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49289", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}], "description": "## Summary

This library turned out to be vulnerable to Denial-of-Service attacks using XPath transforms. A mitigation has been put in place to restrict the number of transforms and to restrict transforms to only the transform-algorithms mentioned in the SAML 2.0 Core Specifications (and specifically refuse XPath transforms).

## Impact

An attacker is able to send specially crafted messages to any entity relying on SimpleSAMLphp (or directly on this SAML2-library) to be able to perform a Denial-of-Service attack.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5cjr-mxj5-wmrx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T20:27:23Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5cjr-mxj5-wmrx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5cjr-mxj5-wmrx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49289"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-02T20:27:23Z", "references": ["https://github.com/simplesamlphp/saml2/security/advisories/GHSA-5cjr-mxj5-wmrx", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5cjr-mxj5-wmrx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/simplesamlphp/saml2/security-advisories/GHSA-5cjr-mxj5-wmrx", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/simplesamlphp/saml2", "summary": "SimpleSAMLphp has Possible DoS via XPath Transform", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T20:27:23Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-5cjr-mxj5-wmrx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.20.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "simplesamlphp/saml2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 4.20.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.20.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "simplesamlphp/saml2-legacy"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 4.20.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: SimpleSAMLphp has Possible DoS via XPath Transform
